narrative: Markets assess odds for a US-Iran peace deal as mixed signals on an interim agreement emerge — USD/JPY holds at 160.11 near intervention thresholds while 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid. Dollar remains steady as hot CPI data offsets cooler core inflation; gold +0.00%; equities +0.50%; DXY +0.06%; VIX 17.7. Watch BoJ and RBA rate decisions on June 16 followed by the FOMC on June 17.
